author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: Refactor Hits component (algolia/react-instantsearch#654)
body:
* refactor(Hits): remove useless eslint comments

* refactor(Hits): rename parameter in defaultProps

* refactor(Hits): use functional instead of class component

* refactor(Hits): use destructuring on default component

* refactor(hits): use props in default component for now
